Headline: Louis Thevenet
Description: Louis François Joseph Marie Thevenet (12 February 1874 in Bruges – 16 August 1930 in Halle) was a Belgian painter. He is best known for interior portraits and still-lifes.

Headline: Harpalus providens
Description: Harpalus providens is a species of ground beetle in the subfamily Harpalinae.[1] It was described by Casey in 1914.[1]

Headline: Pasquale Orsini
Description: Pasquale Orsini (born 1970) is an Italian palaeographer, librarian, and Professor from Università di Catania-Siracusa.

Headline: Pješčanica
Description: Pješčanica (Serbian Cyrillic: Пјешчаница)[1] is a village in central Croatia, in the municipality of Gvozd, Sisak-Moslavina County. It is connected by the D6 highway.

Headline: Jan Rys-Rozsévač
Description: Jan Rys-Rozsévač (1 November 1901 – 27 June 1946) was a Czech journalist and politician. He was the leader of fascist organisation Vlajka.
